examples.title: Exponential Distribution PDF and CDF
examples.description: Calculate PDF, CDF, and survival function for Exponential distribution
examples.explanation: Demonstrates computation of PDF, CDF, and survival function for exponential distribution with various λ values

examples.title: Exponential Random Number Generation
examples.description: Generate random samples from Exponential distribution using inverse transform method
examples.code:
import random
import math

def exponential_rvs(lam, size=1):
    """Generate random variates from Exponential(λ) using inverse transform"""
    samples = []
    for _ in range(size):
        u = random.random()  # Uniform(0,1)
        x = -math.log(1 - u) / lam  # Inverse of CDF: F⁻¹(u) = -ln(1-u)/λ
        samples.append(x)
    return samples

def estimate_parameters(data):
    """Estimate λ using MLE: λ̂ = 1/x̄"""
    n = len(data)
    mean = sum(data) / n
    lambda_hat = 1 / mean
    return lambda_hat, mean

# Generate 1000 samples with λ = 0.5
lam_true = 0.5
samples = exponential_rvs(lam_true, size=1000)

# Estimate λ from samples
lam_est, sample_mean = estimate_parameters(samples)
print(f"True λ: {lam_true}")
print(f"Sample mean: {sample_mean:.4f}")
print(f"Estimated λ (MLE): {lam_est:.4f}")
print(f"Error: {abs(lam_true - lam_est):.4f}")
examples.explanation: Uses inverse transform sampling to generate exponential random variates and demonstrates MLE parameter estimation
